title: Fiona’s daily news 6.4💵经济1️⃣ 多只纽交所股票显示近100%下跌，纽交所称系技术问题
text: Fiona’s daily news 6.4💵经济1️⃣ 多只纽交所股票显示近100%下跌，纽交所称系技术问题。https://www.cbsnews.com/news/nyse-technical-issue-warren-buffett-berkshire-hathaway/2️⃣ AMD挑战英伟达，新AI芯片性能是H200的1.3倍。 https://www.capacitymedia.com/article/2dbhdi09uei52nt4ms5c0/news/amds-ai-chips-to-challenge-nvidia3️⃣ Imec和ASML在荷兰开设高NA EUV光刻实验室，为芯片制造商提供测试版高NA EUV扫描仪。https://www.reuters.com/technology/asml-belgiums-imec-open-laboratory-test-newest-chip-making-tool-2024-06-03/🪙币圈1️⃣ 泰国证交会批准One Asset Management推出首个比特币ETF，仅限富裕和机构投资者。https://www.bangkokpost.com/business/investment/2804674/thai-sec-approves-first-bitcoin-etf2️⃣ Binance将从2024年6月30日起限制EEA用户使用未授权的稳定币。https://www.binance.com/en/support/announcement/mica-stablecoin-rules-implementation-announcement-884c621e335540e0add5fdce315971213️⃣ 澳大利亚首个现货比特币ETF IBTC将于周二在Cboe Australia上市。 https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2024/06/03/australiass-first-spot-bitcoin-etf-with-direct-btc-holdings-to-go-live-on-tuesday/?utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=coindesk_main&utm_term=organic&utm_content=editorial&utm_medium=social4️⃣ CoinShares：5月加密投资产品流入20亿美元，以太坊市场情绪“转变”。https://www.theblock.co/post/298181/crypto-investment-products-2-billion-inflows-may-turnaround-ethereum-sentiment-coinshares5️⃣ GameStop股票飙升，周一早盘上涨超75%。https://x.com/abc/status/1797881227216670820?s=466️⃣ “MEME游乐园”Pump.fun：代币发行量占Solana超七成，3人团队创造3000万美元收入。https://x.com/theblock__/status/1797948767909425566?s=467️⃣ 美国现货比特币ETF周一净流入1.0512亿美元，Fidelity的FBTC领跑。 https://www.theblock.co/post/298302/spot-bitcoin-etfs-2-billion
content:
Fiona’s daily news 6.4

💵经济

https://www.reuters.com/technology/asml-belgiums-imec-open-laboratory-test-newest-chip-making-tool-2024-06-03/

NYSE glitch sends Berkshire Hathaway shares down nearly 100%
